ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "host_id" INTEGER /* ID of the host who owns the property */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the property is situated */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of room offered (e.g., Private room, Entire home/apt) */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Price of the property per night */,
  "minimum_nights" INTEGER /* Minimum number of nights required for a booking */,
  "number_of_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews left for the property */,
  "last_review" TEXT /* Date of the last review left for the property */,
  "reviews_per_month" REAL /* Average number of reviews left per month for the property */,
  "calculated_host_listings_count" INTEGER /* Number of listings the host has for this property */,
  "availability_365" INTEGER /* Number of days the property is available for booking per year */,
  "days_from_last_review" INTEGER /* Number of days since the last review was left for the property */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available in the property */,
  "property_size" INTEGER /* Size of the property in square feet */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms */,
  "property_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "image_urls" TEXT /* URLs to images of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_host_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_id") REFERENCES hosts ("host_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hosts" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Name of the host */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the host */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the host */,
  "host_since" TEXT /* Date when the host started hosting */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Average response time of the host */,
  "response_rate" REAL /* Percentage of inquiries responded to by the host */,
  "total_listings_count" INTEGER /* Total number of listings by the host */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the property is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the property is located */,
  "zipcode" TEXT /* Zipcode of the location */,
  "neighbourhood_group" TEXT /* Group of neighborhoods where the property is located (e.g., Queens, Brooklyn) */,
  "neighbourhood" TEXT /* Specific neighborhood where the property is located (e.g., Jackson Heights, Williamsburg) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being reviewed */,
  "renter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the renter who left the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was left */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the renter (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "response_from_host" TEXT /* Response from the host to the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_renter_id FOREIGN KEY ("renter_id") REFERENCES renters ("renter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "renters" (
  "renter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each renter */,
  "renter_name" TEXT /* Name of the renter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the renter */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the renter */,
  "renter_since" TEXT /* Date when the renter started renting */,
  "preferred_location" TEXT /* Preferred location for renting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("renter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being booked */,
  "renter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the renter who made the booking */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date the booking was made */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Date the renter checks in */,
  "check_out_date" TEXT /* Date the renter checks out */,
  "total_price" INTEGER /* Total price for the booking */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_renter_id FOREIGN KEY ("renter_id") REFERENCES renters ("renter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property related to the message */,
  "host_id" INTEGER /* ID of the host who sent the message */,
  "renter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the renter who received the message */,
  "message_date" TEXT /* Date the message was sent */,
  "message_text" TEXT /* Text of the message */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Status indicating if the message has been read (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_renter_id FOREIGN KEY ("renter_id") REFERENCES renters ("renter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_host_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_id") REFERENCES hosts ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., host, renter, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
